params.prompt: An open color-coded notebook photographed flat on a dark mossy surface, soft twilight light. Game UI menu skin. The two pages are TONED KRAFT / TEA-STAINED paper in deep sage-olive and dusty mauve — clearly colored, NEVER white, NEVER cream, NEVER pale; a moody mid-to-deep value like aged botanical herbarium pages, with subtle texture and darker shading toward the edges. Delicate dark ink hand-drawn border and small pressed-flower botanical illustrations in the corners. Color-coded washi tabs along the top edge in muted green, plum, teal and amber. A thin dusty-rose ribbon bookmark. Faint hand-ruled lines just barely visible. Soft shadowy painterly lighting, cohesive girls'-keepsake-notebook feel but aged and toned, no text, no UI buttons, no people. Square composition, generous empty page space for overlaying menu content.
